title: Hide Invis Msgs
description: Obfuscates / hides death messages and kill messages that invisible players get. Both default to true but can be edited through gamerule commands.
body:
Obfuscates death messages and kill messages that invisible players get. Both default to true but can be edited through gamerule commands:

    /gamerule hideinvismsgs:obfuscate_invis_deaths <True/False>
    /gamerule hideinvismsgs:obfuscate_invis_kills <True/False>
    v1.1+
    /gamerule hideinvismsgs:show_invis_team_name <True/False>
    v1.2+
    /gamerule hideinvismsgs:obfuscate_weapon_name <True/False>
